project_type: Kotlin Multiplatform (Compose) RPG game with Desktop and Android targets
build_system: Gradle 8.14+ with Compose Multiplatform plugin. Uses composeResources for WAV files.
test_framework: kotlin.test with commonTest (runs via desktopTest task)
verification_instructions: 1. Run ./gradlew desktopTest to verify all tests pass. 2. Run ./gradlew build to ensure full compilation. 3. Optionally ./gradlew :composeApp:run to visually test.
setup_instructions: JDK 17+ pre-installed. ./gradlew build handles all dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. JDK available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: All gameplay is deterministic. No AI/LLM in the loop. All voice lines from existing WAV archives. Design-Lock: Prologue + 3 Chapters allowed, no new mechanics beyond BarkEvent -> Questbook.
key_patterns: 1. BarkEvent enum defines all barks. 2. BarkRegistry maps each to BarkDefinition (character, type, scope, cooldown). 3. BarkAudioRegistry maps each to WAV filename. 4. Both registries have init{} blocks that require EVERY BarkEvent entry has a mapping - will fail at runtime otherwise. 5. QuestbookProcessor.process() has a when() over ALL BarkEvent values. 6. SlicePhase enum drives the state machine. 7. GameMaps uses ASCII art with legend maps. 8. EnemyArchetype enum defines enemy templates. 9. BossController drives 3-phase boss logic. 10. SliceScreen.kt contains the full UI state machine and wires everything together. 11. CombatEngine is tick-based, deterministic.
directory_structure: composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/ - game logic (bark/, combat/, questbook/, world/). composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ui/rpg/ - Compose UI. composeApp/src/commonMain/composeResources/files/bark/{nib,brugg,vellum}/ - WAV files. composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/ - tests.
